ogTitle: St Huberts Island vs St Ives Chase: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Huberts Island and St Ives Chase.
heading: St Huberts Island vs St Ives Chase — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Huberts Island, New South Wales and St Ives Chase, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Ives Chase has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to St Huberts Island (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Huberts Island or St Ives Chase safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Huberts Island has a flood risk score of 35/100, while St Ives Chase scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Huberts Island scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. St Ives Chase scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Huberts Island or St Ives Chase?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Ives Chase has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
